name: Battle Life Online
short_description: Are you good or evil? Choose your role. Shape this world.
detailed_description:
The island is alive - every decision matters.

Jump into Battle Life Online, the standalone open-world multiplayer RPG where real players determine who survives, who rules, and who falls. Your life. Your path.

Factions and roles:

- Civilian: Start neutral and shape your life through work, trade, or risky actions.

- Police: Enforce the law, apprehend criminal players, and put them in jail. Protect order - or fail and experience chaos.

- Rebel: Break the law, rob other players, cook drugs, sell stolen vehicles to expand your power.

- Tech: Join the high-tech elite with superior vehicles, weapons, and combat skills - dominate your opponents.

Open world:

64+ km² island with meadows, forests, deserts, and tropical zones.

Every player, every encounter, every decision changes the world.

Real players. Real consequences. Real freedom.

Collect / Fight / Earn / Win

Special features:

- Player-based moderation:

Dedicated players can earn moderation rights by reaching a high level in the game. Internal systems protect against abuse.

This keeps the game world actively protected without external waiting times.

- In-game success with real value:

Certain earned content can be traded on the Steam Community Market. This allows in-game success to be optionally converted into Steam credit. No real money pressure, no crypto, no NFTs, no external systems – 100% via Steam.
